description: Fix two bugs: 1) AI Import uses non-existent model gemini-3.5-flash (change to gemini-2.0-flash), 2) Referral page not displaying properly.
steps: 1. Replace all 3 occurrences of 'gemini-3.5-flash' with 'gemini-2.0-flash' in src/lib/gemini.ts.
2. Investigate and fix referral page display issue (framer-motion dependency, routing, or other cause).
acceptance_criteria: gemini.ts uses 'gemini-2.0-flash' model name in all 3 places
Referral page renders correctly without errors
findings: Bug 1 (AI Import): The model name gemini-3.5-flash does not exist in Google's API. Changed to gemini-2.0-flash in all 3 functions (importTestFromText, importTestFromImage, importTestFromFile). Bug 2 (Referral page): The page builds and compiles correctly. The display issue was caused by two factors: (1) Sidebar active link detection incorrectly highlighted the Dashboard link instead of the Referral link when on /dashboard/referral, making it seem like navigation didn't work; (2) The error state when the API returned non-ok was minimal and hard to notice. Fixed both. Also improved error handling to not parse response body when status is not ok, and added a reload button for better UX.
